vehicle.label: 6-DOF Industrial Arm
vehicle.desc: 6-DOF serial industrial robot arm, 5kg payload, 600mm reach

parts.label: Base Joint (J1)
parts.spec: Base rotary joint J1, +-180deg, harmonic drive, 100Nm peak torque, mounting flange ISO 9409

parts.label: Shoulder Joint (J2)
parts.spec: Shoulder pitch joint J2, +-120deg, harmonic drive, 80Nm, cable routing through center bore

parts.label: Upper Arm (Link 2-3)
parts.spec: Upper arm link, 300mm length, hollow tube with cable conduit, lightweight Al 7075

parts.label: Elbow Joint (J3)
parts.spec: Elbow pitch joint J3, +-150deg, cycloidal reducer, 50Nm, encoder dual-stack

parts.label: Forearm + Wrist (J4)
parts.spec: Forearm with wrist roll J4, 250mm length, +-360deg continuous, slip ring for power/signal

parts.label: Wrist Pitch (J5)
parts.spec: Wrist pitch joint J5, +-120deg, harmonic drive, 20Nm, compact form factor

parts.label: Wrist Roll (J6)
parts.spec: Wrist final roll joint J6, +-360deg, harmonic drive, 10Nm, ISO 9409-1 50mm tool flange

parts.label: Tool Flange + Changer
parts.spec: Tool changer master plate at J6 end, pneumatic locking, 4 utility ports

parts.label: Cable Management Spine
parts.spec: External cable carrier from base to wrist, drag chain or spiral, signal + power + pneumatic

parts.label: Replaceable Motor Module Set
parts.spec: Actuation_motors closure module: replaceable motor_module cartridges for J1-J6, fastener_access, coupling_dummy, insert/washer preload pads, torque_Nm intent labels

parts.label: Encoder Cover + Sensing Set
parts.spec: Sensing_encoders closure module: encoder_pocket and encoder_cover at each joint, index marks, cable exit strain relief, inspection labels

parts.label: Drive Electronics Bay
parts.spec: Drive_electronics bay with driver_bay, power_channel, signal_channel, ground_point, service cover, connector keying, thermal inspection window

generated_parts.label: Base Joint (J1)
generated_parts.spec: Base rotary joint J1, +-180deg, harmonic drive, 100Nm peak torque, mounting flange ISO 9409

verify.value: All required fields are present and correctly formatted.
verify.rule: The blueprint must include all required fields and adhere to the specified schema.

verify.value: Mass estimate is provided and within expected range.
verify.rule: The blueprint must include a mass estimate that is within the expected range for the subsystem.

verify.value: All P0 internal_feature_targets are represented in part_tree/geometry_ops.
verify.rule: Each P0 internal_feature_target must be represented as a part_tree child and geometry_ops id or target.

verify.value: All interfaces have reciprocal connections with neighboring subsystems.
verify.rule: Each interface must have a reciprocal connection with the neighboring subsystem, including connection_type, DOF, clearance_mm, and required_feature.

verify.value: Critical joints have visible locking and preload evidence.
verify.rule: Critical joints must have visible locking and preload evidence, including locking method and torque/preload intent.

verify.value: Fixture points, thermal zones, and pressure faces are defined.
verify.rule: Boundary_conditions must include fixture_points, thermal_zones, and pressure_faces.

risk.desc: Potential for thermal stress due to high torque and limited heat dissipation.
risk.mit: Implement a heat sink or cooling system to manage thermal stress.

risk.desc: Risk of cable strain due to insufficient strain relief geometry.
risk.mit: Ensure all cable exits have strain relief geometry and routing respects minimum bend radius.

risk.desc: Risk of misalignment during assembly due to lack of clear assembly sequence.
risk.mit: Define a clear assembly sequence with tool, torque, and datum per step.

risk.desc: Risk of structural failure due to inadequate ribbing or stiffening.
risk.mit: Increase ribbing or stiffening to improve structural integrity.

risk.desc: Risk of improper fastener engagement due to insufficient engagement depth.
risk.mit: Ensure all threaded connections have adequate engagement depth and wall thickness.

_subsystem_plan.subsystem_role: Base rotary joint, provides rotational movement for the robot arm

physics_paths.load_path: Payload force transmitted from the end effector through the arm links to the base joint
physics_paths.thermal_path: Heat generated by the motor and drive train is conducted through the joint housing to the base plate
physics_paths.motion_path: Rotational motion of the base joint drives the arm's orientation
physics_paths.pressure_path: Pressure from the mounting bolts and preload washers maintains structural integrity and alignment
physics_paths.electrical_path: Power and signal cables are routed through the base plate to the motor and control electronics
physics_paths.service_path: Service access for maintenance and replacement of the harmonic drive and motor

risk.desc: Potential thermal stress due to harmonic drive heat dissipation.
risk.mit: Implement thermal management solutions such as heat sinks or cooling channels.

risk.desc: Risk of cable harness damage due to tight routing.
risk.mit: Ensure sufficient slack in harness routing and use strain relief at critical points.

risk.desc: Risk of harmonic drive failure due to improper preload.
risk.mit: Conduct load testing to ensure proper harmonic drive preload.

risk.desc: Risk of assembly tolerance stack-up errors.
risk.mit: Perform detailed tolerance analysis and adjust manufacturing tolerances accordingly.

risk.desc: Risk of insufficient bearing clearance leading to premature wear.
risk.mit: Verify bearing clearance and preload during assembly and testing.

_subsystem_plan.subsystem_role: Shoulder pitch joint, +-120deg, harmonic drive, 80Nm, cable routing through center bore

physics_paths.description: Transmits payload torque and force from end effector to shoulder joint
Routes control signals and power from base to wrist module
Heat dissipation from harmonic drive and bearings

manufacturing_strategy.datum: Primary locating faces, rail guides, axis rings, spar sockets, or mating pads

risk.mit: Simplify internal geometry to ensure clear access paths.

_subsystem_plan.subsystem_role: Forearm with wrist roll J4, 250mm length, +-360deg continuous, slip ring for power/signal

physics_paths.description: Payload load is transferred through the wrist pitch and roll axes to the forearm bearing seat.
Power and signal flow from the slip ring to the wrist module interface via power distribution board.
Heat from the motor is dissipated through the wrist pitch and roll axes and reducer dummy to the ambient environment.
Motion is transmitted from the shoulder through the reducer dummy to the wrist roll axis.
Human access for maintenance and inspection is provided through the wrist module interface.
